## 🪄 The Wish
What new power should the realm gain? Describe the feature.

## 🔥 The Trial It Conquers
What hardship or void does this spell vanquish?

## 📖 The Incantation
How might it work? Sketch the magic.

## 🗝️ Alternate Paths
Other spells or workarounds you have weighed.

## 💎 Treasures & Lore
Mockups, links, or extra context.
